description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 2 hrs 17 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 45 mins. His activity was mainly in Java, Bash, and Markdown. The data shows work spread across 4 projects, but no public repositories, commits, PRs, or new repos were recorded.
